meaning: adj.岸的,岸上的,沿岸的,近岸的
examples: It will be equipped with three ship-to-shore gantry cranes and three transtainers for shoreside movements.
Please swing the derricks at Hatch No. 3 to the shoreside because our floating crane will come alongside to unload the heavy lifts.
Drinkers congregate in the shoreside bars.
